svg.title: Build rhythm: direct Codex health and GitHub activity
svg.desc: Build rhythm contains two independent measures: anonymous, non-additive direct Codex quota health and aggregate weekly GitHub activity. Direct Codex quota health for two anonymous accounts. Last complete 2026-07-16 12:36 UTC · 2 healthy · 2 fresh · 2 quota-observed Accounts at limit are unknown because the sanitized collector does not expose that count. Quota windows remain per-account and non-additive. The Personal 20.9B token rounded checkpoint was captured July 12, 2026, covers one of two accounts, and is not a combined lifetime. GitHub activity, last five years at weekly grain. Totals: 3,058 commits, 29,354,348 additions, 28,548,651 deletions, and 161 active weeks.
svg.text: Anonymous quota health and long-term aggregate contribution history
